primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹50,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹7,000 Cr (14%), R&D ~₹3,500 Cr (7%), Selling & marketing ~₹8,500 Cr (17%).

primary_sources.source_name: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 500124)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹32,000 Cr. Employee ~18%, R&D ~6%, Selling & marketing ~12%.

primary_sources.source_name: OPPI (Organisation of Pharmaceutical Producers of India) India Pharma Industry Review 2024
primary_sources.notes: Industry cost structure: R&D 5-10% of revenue, selling & distribution 14-20%, employee 12-20%.

primary_sources.source_name: IQVIA India Pharma Market Outlook 2024 (public summary)
primary_sources.notes: India pharma market structure: domestic branded generics, export-oriented manufacturers. Cost benchmarks by segment.

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from FY24-25 annual reports of 3 listed Indian pharma companies (Sun Pharma, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's). OPPI India Pharma Review 2024 and IQVIA public data used for cross-validation. Categories as % of net revenue. P25 is operationally efficient global pharma player; P90 is domestic-only, small-scale player.

HR.source_note: Employee cost % of revenue. Sun Pharma FY25: ~14%, Cipla FY25: ~16%, Dr. Reddy's FY25: ~18%. OPPI: 12-20% range. Best-in-class: scale manufacturers with high automation.

MARKETING.source_note: Selling, medical representative, and distribution costs. Sun Pharma FY25: ~17%, Cipla FY25: ~14%, Dr. Reddy's FY25: ~12%. OPPI: domestic-focused companies 18-24%.

RND.source_note: R&D expenditure % of revenue. Sun Pharma FY25: 7%, Cipla FY25: 5.5%, Dr. Reddy's FY25: 6%. OPPI: India pharma R&D 5-10% for innovator-oriented companies; generics-only: 2-4%.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Contract manufacturing and CMO costs. IQVIA India 2024: contract manufacturing growing; generics-only domestic players use CMOs 20-30% of production.

IT.source_note: IT including regulatory systems (eTMF, PV systems), ERP, track-and-trace. Gartner Pharma IT 2024: pharma 2-4% of revenue on technology. FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliance drives IT spend.

FACILITIES.source_note: Office, lab, and non-manufacturing facilities. Manufacturing plant costs excluded. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — estimated from Indian pharma overhead structure.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Regulatory filing fees, legal (USFDA responses, patent litigation), audit. Sun Pharma FY25: significant regulatory compliance spend disclosed. USFDA-approved companies higher.

LOGISTICS_INDIA.source_note: Cold-chain and distribution logistics. CII Pharma Logistics 2024: India pharma logistics 3-6% of revenue; cold chain adds 30-50% premium.

INSURANCE.source_note: Product liability, D&O, clinical trial insurance. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — higher for US-market pharma companies due to product liability.
